name: Pepsi Cola Cake with Peanut Butter Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease and flour a 9 x 13 x 2 inches pan.
3. Combine flour and sugar in a large bowl.
4. Melt butter.
5. Add cocoa and Pepsi cola to the melted butter. Mix until well combined.
6. Pour this mixture over the flour mixture in another bowl. Stir until just blended.
7. Add buttermilk, beaten eggs, baking soda, and vanilla extract. Stir until smooth.
8. Fold in miniature marshmallows until evenly distributed.
9. Pour batter into prepared pan and spread evenly.
10. Bake for 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Remove from oven and frost with peanut butter frosting while still warm. Serve at room temperature, cut into 20 portions of 2 x 3 inches each.
